test_a_share_selection_scripts.py.reason: Core CLI behavior shares frame builders and artifact assertions across validation and scoring scenarios.
test_a_share_selection_scripts.py.split_boundary: Separate validation contracts from scoring and provenance contracts after shared fixtures move to a support module.
test_a_share_selection_scripts.py.reassess_when: the next core validation or scoring behavior is added

test_document_consistency.py.reason: Repository-wide navigation, script topology, and artifact documentation contracts share common Markdown parsing helpers.
test_document_consistency.py.split_boundary: Separate another cohesive contract family after its assertions and fixtures can move without cross-file imports.
test_document_consistency.py.reassess_when: another contract family adds 200 lines or this file reaches 1500 lines

test_fetch_zzshare_a_share.py.reason: Provider pagination, rate-limit, checkpoint, and metadata tests share one deterministic fake client.
test_fetch_zzshare_a_share.py.split_boundary: Separate transport controls from artifact and checkpoint contracts after the fake client becomes shared support.
test_fetch_zzshare_a_share.py.reassess_when: zzshare transport or checkpoint behavior changes

test_full_a_clean_pool_provenance.py.reason: The provenance gate tests reuse one artifact graph and tamper matrix across pre-score and post-score checks.
test_full_a_clean_pool_provenance.py.split_boundary: Separate artifact construction, tamper rejection, and runner closure after extracting the graph fixture.
test_full_a_clean_pool_provenance.py.reassess_when: another provenance or closure contract changes, or this file reaches 1400 lines

test_recovery_and_safety_helpers.py.reason: Recovery planning, incremental execution, and verified merge tests share resumable bucket fixtures and safety helpers.
test_recovery_and_safety_helpers.py.split_boundary: Separate retry planning, clean-pool merge, and bucket execution after moving shared bucket fixtures to support code.
test_recovery_and_safety_helpers.py.reassess_when: another incremental provider or recovery state is added, or this file reaches 2200 lines

test_external_source_stability_probe.py.reason: Probe execution, durable archive integrity, and persisted redaction scenarios share deterministic source specifications and manifest fixtures.
test_external_source_stability_probe.py.split_boundary: Separate archive integrity and redaction persistence scenarios after moving shared probe metadata fixtures to support code.
test_external_source_stability_probe.py.reassess_when: another archive evidence or redaction contract is added, or this file reaches 1200 lines

test_today_a_share_html_report.py.reason: Static report sections share candidate fixtures, localization assertions, and consumer-view helpers imported by disclosure tests.
test_today_a_share_html_report.py.split_boundary: Separate localization, candidate tables, K-line data, and disclosure views after stabilizing a shared report fixture API.
test_today_a_share_html_report.py.reassess_when: a report section or candidate data contract changes, or a productized visual shell test exceeds 80 lines

test_today_a_share_selection_runner.py.reason: Runner integration scenarios share command executors, output fixtures, and failure cleanup assertions across the same public CLI.
test_today_a_share_selection_runner.py.split_boundary: Separate input, provider, recovery, provenance, and output closure scenarios after extracting runner executor support.
test_today_a_share_selection_runner.py.reassess_when: a runner option, provider, or output artifact is added, or this file reaches 7000 lines

test_document_consistency.py.trigger: The file was within 13 lines of its 1600-line trigger before adding new source-routing contract coverage.
test_document_consistency.py.decision: Move data-source and source-routing registry tests into test_skill_registry_consistency.py while retaining navigation and artifact documentation contracts.
test_document_consistency.py.next_trigger: another contract family adds 200 lines or this file reaches 1500 lines

test_full_a_clean_pool_provenance.py.trigger: Short-history display-path binding expanded the atomic provenance closure contract.
test_full_a_clean_pool_provenance.py.decision: Keep the shared artifact graph intact because the change adds path identity without a new schema object.
test_full_a_clean_pool_provenance.py.next_trigger: another provenance or closure contract changes, or this file reaches 1400 lines

test_recovery_and_safety_helpers.py.trigger: Baostock audited no-trading recovery added another incremental execution state.
test_recovery_and_safety_helpers.py.decision: Bucket-specific scenarios now live in the dedicated incremental execution safety suite; retain shared planning fixtures until the next state.
test_recovery_and_safety_helpers.py.next_trigger: another incremental provider or recovery state is added, or this file reaches 2200 lines

test_today_a_share_html_report.py.trigger: The productized visual shell contract accumulated 173 assertions in one 455-line test method.
test_today_a_share_html_report.py.decision: Extract one immutable report fixture and split structure, styling, responsive, candidate-detail, and accessibility contracts into focused methods without changing assertions.
test_today_a_share_html_report.py.next_trigger: a report section or candidate data contract changes, or a productized visual shell test exceeds 80 lines

test_today_a_share_selection_runner.py.trigger: CI runtime review found the cohesive runner suite was the dominant serial shard bottleneck.
test_today_a_share_selection_runner.py.decision: Keep shared integration fixtures in one source file and execute deterministic method-level shards; physical splitting remains deferred until runner executor support is extracted.
test_today_a_share_selection_runner.py.next_trigger: a runner option, provider, or output artifact is added, or this file reaches 7000 lines
